ogTitle: Lysterfield vs Lysterfield South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lysterfield and Lysterfield South.
heading: Lysterfield vs Lysterfield South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lysterfield, Victoria and Lysterfield South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lysterfield has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Lysterfield South (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lysterfield or Lysterfield South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lysterfield has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Lysterfield South scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lysterfield scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Lysterfield South scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lysterfield or Lysterfield South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lysterfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
